title: We need to have --stop and --terminate options for commands started with `isolationMode detached`
body: The issue requests `--stop <id>` to send CTRL+C to commands started with `isolationMode detached`, `--terminate <id>` to terminate such commands immediately, and `--status` output to provide process IDs for the command and isolation container/session such as screen, Docker, tmux, and similar backends. It also requests issue data collection under `docs/case-studies/issue-112`, online research, requirements extraction, possible solution plans, and a single pull request implementing the requirements.
